items.title: iOS 27 beta 4 adds a useful Apple TV app feature, here's how it works
items.summary: Apple released iOS 27 beta 4 today, and it comes with a useful new "Automatic Downloads" feature in the Apple TV app. Here's how it works.

items.title: Anthropic's landmark $1.5B copyright settlement is approved
items.summary: The final approval settles one case, but it doesn't resolve the broader issue of using copyrighted works to train AI models.

items.title: Samsung Debuts Galaxy Card With 5% Cash Back to Take On Apple Card

items.title: Trump's latest AI czar has already resigned
items.summary: The director role for the Center for AI Standards and Innovation (CAISI) has become a revolving door since David Sacks left his position as czar.

items.title: Everything New in iOS 27 Beta 4

items.title: Apple leases 126,000-square-foot office building in Sunnyvale
items.summary: After an intense real estate push across the South Bay in 2025, Apple is once again expanding its footprint in Sunnyvale. Here are the details.

items.title: The enduring paradox of the AI economy - models get better and more efficient, yet costs can still easily spiral out of control
items.summary: Token amplification creates a paradox in the AI economy, as more capable models beget more complicated tasks.

items.title: What Type of Bluetooth Beacon Does Cisco Spaces Use?
items.summary: Cisco Spaces uses generic Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) beacons rather than one proprietary beacon type. It can detect and process beacons from multiple vendors and is broadly protocol-agnostic. Note that the information on the Cisco Spaces...
